Node - Class in model
Represents a node in the graph.

Creates a new node with a given identifier.

Constants used to define the rendering limits of the graph

Callback invoked when a node is clicked

Indicates whether the controller is waiting for a click to create a node

nodeWasDragged - Variable in class view.GraphView
